sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 62:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 62:1
items.html: The screen between Atzilut and Beria that passes the ten Sefirot from Atzilut to Beria becomes a “complete clothing” that limits these ten Sefirot. (Part 3, Chapter 4, item 5)
